① Signal
Signal
Play the over 6.5.2 units
High-confidence edge — 81% model conviction at 9.9K vs 6.5 line.
Cease generates genuine swing-and-miss (37.1% WHF, above LG) — stuff can pile up Ks when working. CH is an effective two-strike weapon — batters who get deep in counts are in trouble. SEA is roughly neutral — 24.38% MIX-K close to league average. Moderate variance (σ1.7K) — no major consistency flags.
⚠ Best value at the 6.5 alt line vs the 8.5 market main — be on the right number.
Bet wins if
✓CH converts two-strike counts (26% putaway rate) — batters can't put it in play late
✓Elite swing-and-miss stuff (37.1% WHF) — Ks can stack quickly when he's on
Bet loses if
✗He averages only 5.8 IP — short outings cap K upside hard
✗Control is a problem (4.3 BB/9) — walks eat PA and he works from behind in counts

Over 4.5 is the play.1 unit
Solid over edge at 5.5K vs 4.5. 62% CAP — standalone play, not a parlay filler.
Perkins is above average on whiff rate (27.7%) — solid enough to capitalize when lineup cooperates. Putaway pitch (CH) is below average — converting deep counts to Ks is a genuine weak spot. MIA is a mild headwind — 23.04% MIX-K just below average vs his specific stuff. Very consistent output (σ1.3K) — model projection is reliable here.
⚠ Best value at the 4.5 alt line vs the 5.5 market main — be on the right number.
Bet wins if
✓Consistent output (σ1.3K) — model projection is reliable, not driven by one outlier
Bet loses if
✗He averages only 4.6 IP — short outings cap K upside hard

Over 5.5 is the play.1 unit
Solid over edge at 6.5K vs 5.5. 61% CAP — standalone play, not a parlay filler.
Griffin sits around league average on whiff rate (25.3%) — relies more on weak contact than pure swing-and-miss. Putaway pitch (SL) is below average — converting deep counts to Ks is a genuine weak spot. PIT is roughly neutral — 25.52% MIX-K close to league average. He's in form — recent trend is a tailwind.

Bet loses if
✗He averages only 5.9 IP — short outings cap K upside hard

Over 5.5 is the play.1 unit
Solid over edge at 6.5K vs 5.5. 61% CAP — standalone play, not a parlay filler.
Williams is above average on whiff rate (29.8%) — solid enough to capitalize when lineup cooperates. SI is a serviceable finishing pitch, not dominant in two-strike counts. CWS is tougher than it looks — MIX-K% drops to 22.12%, below league average vs his specific pitch mix. Moderate variance (σ2.0K) — no major consistency flags.
Bet wins if
✓Model projects 6.5K vs 5.5 line — edge is real at current number

✗He averages only 5.8 IP — short outings cap K upside hard

L6.5

① Signal
Signal
Over 6.5 is the play.1 unit
Solid over edge at 7.5K vs 6.5. 61% CAP — standalone play, not a parlay filler.
Ohtani generates genuine swing-and-miss (32.4% WHF, above LG) — stuff can pile up Ks when working. SI is an effective two-strike weapon — batters who get deep in counts are in trouble. SD is a mild headwind — 23.48% MIX-K just below average vs his specific stuff. Very consistent output (σ1.5K) — model projection is reliable here.
Bet wins if
✓He logs his average 6.2 IP — enough PA to let Ks accumulate
✓SI converts two-strike counts (27% putaway rate) — batters can't put it in play late
✓Elite swing-and-miss stuff (32.4% WHF) — Ks can stack quickly when he's on
Bet loses if
✗First-pitch strike rate (54%) is low — he'll work from behind and generate weak contact, not Ks

① Signal
Signal
Over 4.5 is the play.1 unit
Solid over edge at 5.2K vs 4.5. 58% CAP — standalone play, not a parlay filler.
Arrighetti is above average on whiff rate (27.2%) — solid enough to capitalize when lineup cooperates. FC is a serviceable finishing pitch, not dominant in two-strike counts. TB is tougher than it looks — MIX-K% drops to 22.08%, below league average vs his specific pitch mix. He's in form — recent trend is a tailwind.
⚠ Best value at the 4.5 alt line vs the 5.5 market main — be on the right number.
Bet wins if
✓Model projects 5.2K vs 4.5 line — edge is real at current number
Bet loses if
✗He averages only 5.4 IP — short outings cap K upside hard
✗FC is serviceable not dominant (21% putaway) — won't blow batters away
✗Control is a problem (4.6 BB/9) — walks eat PA and he works from behind in counts

① Signal
Signal
Lean over 4.5 — size down.0.5 unit
Marginal over edge (5.1K vs 4.5), 56% conviction — take it reduced.
Scott sits around league average on whiff rate (25.9%) — relies more on weak contact than pure swing-and-miss. Putaway pitch (SW) is below average — converting deep counts to Ks is a genuine weak spot. ATL is a mild headwind — 22.6% MIX-K just below average vs his specific stuff. Moderate variance (σ2.0K) — no major consistency flags.
Bet wins if
✓Model projects 5.1K vs 4.5 line — edge is real at current number
Bet loses if
✗He averages only 4.5 IP — short outings cap K upside hard
✗SW is serviceable not dominant (21% putaway) — won't blow batters away
✗Control is a problem (4.2 BB/9) — walks eat PA and he works from behind in counts

Under 4.5 is the play.1.5 units
Strong under signal — 82% model probability below 4.5 at 3.0K projected.
Martinez is below average on swing-and-miss (18.0% WHF vs 25% LG) — needs favorable conditions to reach Ks. Putaway pitch (SL) is below average — converting deep counts to Ks is a genuine weak spot. HOU is a mild headwind — 22.3% MIX-K just below average vs his specific stuff. He's in form — recent trend is a tailwind.
⚠ Best value at the 4.5 alt line, not the main 3.5 — be on the right number.
Bet wins if
✓Low strikeout rate (K/9 5.5) — he misses bats infrequently, line is inflated
✓Weak finishing pitch (SL at 16% putaway) — survives on weak contact, not strikeouts
✓Short average outing (5.8 IP) — fewer PA limits total K ceiling
Bet loses if
✗K/9 of 5.5 means enough talent to reach 4.5 in a deep outing

Strong under signal — 72% model probability below 4.5 at 3.5K projected.
Keller is below average on swing-and-miss (21.2% WHF vs 25% LG) — needs favorable conditions to reach Ks. Putaway pitch (CU) is below average — converting deep counts to Ks is a genuine weak spot. WSH is tougher than it looks — MIX-K% drops to 20.8%, below league average vs his specific pitch mix. Very consistent output (σ1.2K) — model projection is reliable here.
⚠ Best value at the 4.5 alt line vs the 3.5 market main — be on the right number.
Bet wins if
✓Low strikeout rate (K/9 7.0) — he misses bats infrequently, line is inflated
✓Weak finishing pitch (CU at 16% putaway) — survives on weak contact, not strikeouts
✓Short average outing (5.3 IP) — fewer PA limits total K ceiling
Bet loses if
✗K/9 of 7.0 means enough talent to reach 4.5 in a deep outing

Under 5.5 is the play.1.5 units
Strong under signal — 70% model probability below 5.5 at 4.5K projected.
Bennett sits around league average on whiff rate (23.9%) — relies more on weak contact than pure swing-and-miss. Putaway pitch (SL) is below average — converting deep counts to Ks is a genuine weak spot. LAA is a good matchup — 27.4% MIX-K above LG, lineup vulnerability is a real tailwind. He's in form — recent trend is a tailwind.
⚠ Best value at the 5.5 alt line vs the 4.5 market main — be on the right number.
Bet wins if
✓Low strikeout rate (K/9 6.8) — he misses bats infrequently, line is inflated
✓Weak finishing pitch (SL at 17% putaway) — survives on weak contact, not strikeouts
✓Short average outing (5.5 IP) — fewer PA limits total K ceiling
Bet loses if
✗LAA is a swing-happy lineup (26.4% MIX-K) — could push him to the number

Under edge present (3.5K vs 4.5), 31% confidence — lean only.
Peterson is below average on swing-and-miss (21.2% WHF vs 25% LG) — needs favorable conditions to reach Ks. SL is a serviceable finishing pitch, not dominant in two-strike counts. STL is a mismatch for his arsenal — 18.84% MIX-K, 5+ pts below LG. These batters put his pitches in play. Very consistent output (σ1.5K) — model projection is reliable here.
⚠ Best value at the 4.5 alt line vs the 5.0 market main — be on the right number.

✓STL makes contact vs his specific mix (19.3% MIX-K) — lineup suppresses Ks naturally
✓Short average outing (4.8 IP) — fewer PA limits total K ceiling
Bet loses if

Model projects 4.7K vs 4.5 — edge too thin to take a side.
Harrison is above average on whiff rate (29.6%) — solid enough to capitalize when lineup cooperates. SL is a serviceable finishing pitch, not dominant in two-strike counts. AZ is a mismatch for his arsenal — 15.38% MIX-K, 5+ pts below LG. These batters put his pitches in play. High variance (σ3.1K) — ceiling and floor are both real.
⚠ Best value at the 4.5 alt line vs the 5.5 market main — be on the right number.

Model projects 2.9K vs 2.5 — edge too thin to take a side.
Feltner sits around league average on whiff rate (23.7%) — relies more on weak contact than pure swing-and-miss. Putaway pitch (CH) is below average — converting deep counts to Ks is a genuine weak spot. SF is tougher than it looks — MIX-K% drops to 21.8%, below league average vs his specific pitch mix. Moderate variance (σ1.9K) — no major consistency flags.
⚠ Best value at the 2.5 alt line vs the 3.5 market main — be on the right number.

MODEL
signals · methodology · card guide · v9.9
Performance Tracker
through 2026-07-03

Live results by signal tier — updated each session. ROI uses actual FD odds. Bias = avg(actual − projected Ks), positive means model over-projects. MAE = mean absolute projection error in Ks.

■ Win rate bar fills to actual %▲ Bias positive = model tends to over-project Ks◆ MAE in strikeouts — lower is better● Bias within range
Signal Tiers — What Each Badge Means
STRONG · 2uHighest conviction. Model projects meaningfully more Ks than the line with strong probability and high confidence across multiple signals. Recommended 2 unit bet.
MOD · 1uModerate conviction. Clear edge vs the line with reasonable confidence. Standard 1 unit bet (1.5u when confidence is elevated and variance is low).
LEAN O · 0.5uDirectional lean over. Model sees an edge but confidence or probability does not clear the full action threshold. Half unit only.
LEAN U · 0.5uDirectional lean under. Model projects below the line with some confidence but not enough for full conviction. Half unit only.
UNDER · 1uHigh conviction fade. Model projects meaningfully fewer Ks than the line with strong confidence. 1 unit bet (1.5u when confidence is highest).
WATCH ⇑⇓Signal exists but does not clear the action threshold — confidence too low or variance too high. No bet recommended. Orange = over direction, Silver = under. Blocker reason shown on the card.
PASSNo meaningful signal. Model projects close to the line or insufficient data to form a view.
CAP — Model Confidence

CAP (0-100%) measures how aligned the signals are — not a win probability. High CAP means multiple independent signals point the same direction. Used to gate tier assignment — higher tiers require higher CAP.

Reading a Card
PROJ strip — model projection, edge vs line, P(over), CAP confidence
L10 form bar — last 10 starts coloured by above/below projection
Arsenal panel — pitch mix with whiff% and putaway%. P·WHF = pitcher whiff rate. OPP·WHF = lineup average whiff rate vs that pitch
Lineup panel — confirmed batting order with per-batter K% and whiff%. Green = pitcher advantage, Red = batter advantage
OPP K-MIX strip — BBRef season team K% vs MIX-K% weighted by this pitcher's specific pitch mix
Implied Odds box — probability of clearing each alt line as American odds. BET = recommended line, MKT = market main
Signal strip — action summary, unit size, key reason for signal
Data Sources
Live each session — pitcher L10 K counts, IP, ERA · FanDuel alt lines and odds · confirmed lineups
Savant CSV — batter K%/whiff%/xBA per pitch type · pitcher arsenal whiff%/FPS%/putaway%
Researched — team wRC+ by handedness · L10 runs/game · park factors · bullpen ERA · BBRef team K% splits
Not included — live Statcast splits · bullpen usage · real-time injury status beyond confirmed lineup
Hits TabBETA

P(≥1 hit) for each batter tonight. Built from confirmed lineups and pitcher arsenal data. Sorted by edge vs FanDuel's posted hit line. Early stage — no bullpen data or recent trends. Large edges often reflect model limitations, not market errors.

⚠ For informational and entertainment purposes only. Projections are model outputs — not guarantees. Past performance does not guarantee future results. Bet responsibly.

↑
Hit ProbabilityBETA

P(≥1 hit) from confirmed lineups × per-pitch xBA × starter arsenal. Sorted by model edge vs FD odds — paste FD hit-prop lines each session to compute edges. No bullpen data · season xBA only · starter PAs only.

● Pitch-weighted○ Season fallback⚠ Starter PAs only — no bullpen
